feedback.text: Hello, thank you for giving us a feedback on this important initiative. As we know, the digital world is changing very rapidly, with many people not even doubtful about the situation or how it works. The same applies to legislation and regulatory systems, which find it necessary to find the best solutions well after many consumers have been victims of the predation systems that are burning in this sector. I pay particular attention to a growing media in recent decades, which now plays a very important role in the market and in the cultural entertainment of European citizens: the video game sector. This media outlet is gaining more and more consumers every year, especially young people, the majority of whom are unaware of the problems and dangers to which they are exposed. We already have a history of these abuses with regard to consumers, such as the loot-box episode, but there are also other methods and strategies that affect not only consumers, but also industry in general and developers. Of course, this initiative focuses on consumers, but I just want to express the scale of the issue and the importance of the topic. Several European citizens and video game consumers have already expressed their voices on the topic, notably through the recent ‘StopKillingGames’ initiative, which is already being attacked by giants of the video games industry who have applied practices against consumers. This is a real conflict which, in my view, deserves more attention from the major bodies and regulatory systems. Thank you for reading this message, I wish you a good day.
